## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and related context.

### Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to change)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] Dependencies update

### Related Issue

Closes #(issue number)

## Changes Made

- Change 1
- Change 2
- Change 3

## Testing

### Tests Added/Updated

- [ ] Added unit tests
- [ ] Added integration tests
- [ ] Updated existing tests

### Test Coverage

Describe what was tested:

```bash
# Commands to run tests
cargo test --all
```

### Manual Testing

Describe manual testing performed (if applicable):

1. Step 1
2. Step 2
3. Step 3

## Performance Impact

- [ ] No performance impact
- [ ] Performance improvement (describe)
- [ ] Performance regression (describe and justify)

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README.md (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated docs/ (if applicable)
- [ ] Added code comments (if applicable)
- [ ] Updated examples (if applicable)
- [ ] No documentation changes needed

## Checklist

### Code Quality

- [ ] My code follows the project style guidelines
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code
- [ ] I have commented complex/non-obvious code sections
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings

### Testing

- [ ] All tests pass: `cargo test --all`
- [ ] Code is properly formatted: `cargo fmt --check`
- [ ] No clippy warnings: `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings`
- [ ] Added tests for new functionality
- [ ] Updated tests for modified functionality

### Checklist for Bug Fixes

- [ ] My fix addresses the root cause
- [ ] I've added a test that prevents regression
- [ ] The fix is backward compatible
- [ ] I've tested edge cases

### Checklist for New Features

- [ ] Feature is documented
- [ ] Examples are included
- [ ] Tests are comprehensive
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies added
- [ ] Performance impact is acceptable

### Checklist for Breaking Changes

- [ ] I've marked breaking changes clearly
- [ ] I've noted the break in CHANGELOG.md under the next version
- [ ] I've added deprecation warnings (if applicable)
- [ ] I've explained why this breaking change is necessary

## Additional Notes

Any additional information reviewers should know:

---

**Before submitting, please ensure:**
- [ ] Your branch is up to date with main
- [ ] All CI checks pass
- [ ] You've linked the related issue
- [ ] You've followed the contribution guidelines (CONTRIBUTING.md)

**Thank you for contributing to JailGuard!** 🙏
